docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNGPROMRAT, THIPAYAWAREE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY DICKSON, NICHOLAS SUNGPROMRAT, THIPAYAWAREE
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNGPROMRAT, THIPAYAWAREE HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY THIPAYAWAREE SUNGPROMRAT IS GRANTED. MOTION FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF JUDGMENT GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE PAYMENTS OF $200.00 PER MONTH COMMENCING DECEMBER 10, 2008 AND CONTINUING ON THE 10TH OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL FULLY SATISFIED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY DICKSON, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT SUNGPROMRAT, THIPAYAWAREE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGEMENT CREDITOR - JUDGEMENT CREDITOR'S CONSENT ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO PAY JUDGEMENT IN INSTALLMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY DICKSON, NICHOLAS SUNGPROMRAT, THIPAYAWAREE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICKSON, NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNGPROMRAT, THIPAYAWAREE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,076.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT SUNGPROMRAT, THIPAYAWAREE ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
